forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No worries. Enter your email address and we'll send you a secure password reset link.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgotPassword.successSubtitle1: We've sent a password reset link to:
forgotPassword.successSubtitle2: Please check your inbox (and spam folder) and follow the instructions to reset your password.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.subtitle: Update your public profile information.
editProfile.bioPlaceholder: Tell others a little about yourself...
editProfile.errorNameLength: Name must be less than 50 characters.
editProfile.errorBioLength: Bio must be less than 300 characters.
editProfile.errorUpdate: Error updating profile. Please try again.

createSession.title: Schedule a Session
createSession.subtitle: Pick a date & time at least 1 hour from now. Peers will see it in the calendar.

mentorForm.successText: Your mentor profile is now under review. Once approved, you can start conducting mentorship sessions on PeerLearn.
mentorForm.errorBasicInfo: Please fill all basic information fields
mentorForm.errorSkills: Please select at least one skill
mentorForm.errorExperience: Please fill GitHub and LinkedIn profiles
mentorForm.errorMentorship: Please select at least one mentorship type
mentorForm.errorLogin: You must be logged in to submit an application.
mentorForm.errorTimeout: Submission timed out. Please check your network and try again.
